title: AuditStatus
description: Schema for AuditStatus in Nuix REST API

unverifiedAuditReport.description: Flag indicates whether an unverified audit report exists for the case.

verifiedAuditReports.description: The list of verified audit reports if it exists.

auditReportFilename.description: The filename of the unverified audit report if it exists.

creationDate.description: The creation date of the unverified audit report if it exists.
